ham.subject: Transaction Alert: ₹5,000 debited from your account
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We would like to inform you that a transaction of ₹5,000 has been debited from your savings account ending with 4321 on 07-04-2026. The transaction was made on your debit card with the last four digits 9876.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our customer support immediately at 1800-XXX-XXX or visit your nearest branch.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best regards,

Customer Support Team
XYZ Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Verify your Zoom Meeting Link – Action Required
spam.body:
Hello,

A confidential Zoom meeting has been scheduled for you on 08-04-2026 at 10:00 AM. Your participation is critical for the upcoming project review.

To join the meeting, you must verify your details by clicking the link below within the next 15 minutes to avoid cancellation:

<URL>

Please make sure you have the Zoom app installed and your internet connection stable. If you encounter any issues, contact our IT support at 1800-XXX-XXX.

Regards,

Rajesh Kumar
Project Lead
